prompt: Logo wordmark on pure black background. The text 'MM AGENCY.' in a single horizontal line, all uppercase. All text is medium gray (#8A8A8A) except the period dot at the end which is bright yellow (#FAFA00). CRITICAL: The ENTIRE text uses ONE SINGLE typeface — a bold, blocky, geometric extended sans-serif like Microgramma Extended Bold. Same font for 'MM' and 'AGENCY' — no mixing. Wide rectangular letterforms, thick strokes, sharp corners. This is the subtle navbar version. No icon, no symbol. Pure typography centered on black. Vector quality, flat design.
negative_prompt: icon, symbol, graphic, 3D, gradient, shadow, glow, neon, complex, busy, decorative, serif, script, handwritten, thin lines, light weight, white text, different fonts, mixed typefaces, rounded font, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, noise, grunge
